lastAction: HB462: Built YouTube Engagement Optimizer widget. Research: 2026 YouTube algorithm prioritizes community engagement (likes, comments, shares, saves) over raw watch time. Build: 5 signal weight cards (Comments 25%, Likes 15%, Shares 20%, Saves 20%, CTR 20%), interactive metric inputs, 4 presets (Viral/Strong/Average/Poor), engagement score calculator with rating system, copy analysis functionality, 2026 engagement tips.
